_comment: Design-fidelity gate (round-21, founder-ordered). The handoff PLACEMENT-MAP gives every tier rich components (buyer-card, vs-table, flow, pull-quote, toc/guide-grid, byline-block, meta-reviewed, intake-form, proof-strip, the error-silo problem pattern, stat__delta, diagram-figure). A content page that uses NONE of them is an old-structure carryover on generic primitives only (the audit's core finding). The gate hard-fails such pages UNLESS listed here as known re-pattern debt. A page is removed from this list when it is re-patterned to true handoff fidelity (and then it must keep passing on merit). EXCLUDED from the gate entirely (own patterns): legal docs, 404, the standalone forms (contact/file-review), and pages with no tier surface.
_debt_note: DEBT LIST EMPTY as of 2026-06-14 — every content page passes the per-tier design-fidelity gate on merit. History: (1) the 6 error children + hub were re-patterned to the h202 problem pattern; (2) the tightened per-tier gate surfaced 9 mis-tiered t-bofu pages, re-patterned to BOFU signatures (proof-strip + full intake-form, the payroll-management pattern); (3) /about/methodology/ + /trust/ (both t-mofu, generic-primitive-only) re-patterned to mofu signatures — byline-block (top) + meta-reviewed (foot) + pull-quote, with review-card misuse dropped to stack-8. Any new content page must pass per-tier on merit or be added here with a dated reason. (Open design question still deferred to founder: whether buyer-card/vs-table belong on the 9 t-bofu conversion pages, or whether some are really t-mofu; not blocking.)
